info.name: Clan of the Nature's Wrath
info.description: The Nature's Wrath subclass for the Crusader.
info.author: Guzufu

description.p: Protect the wilds with powerful strikes and sickening defences

Crusaders of the Clan of Nature’s Wrath are sentinels of the natural world, hunting down bestial threats that roam the lands. Many Crusaders of this clan wear armour covered in twigs, vines and roots to connect themselves to the natural world they work so hard to protect.
When you activate your Crusader Ward and whenever a creature starts its turn within your range, you can choose to make that creature take 1d8 poison damage.

sheet.description: When you activate your Crusader Ward and whenever a creature starts its turn within your range, you can choose to make that creature take 1d8 poison damage.

description.p: When a creature rerolls a saving throw thanks to your Crusader Ward, they gain temporary hit points equal to your Crusader Level.

sheet.description: When a creature rerolls a saving throw thanks to your Crusader Ward, they gain {{level:crusader}} temporary hit points.

description.p: When you hit a creature with an attack that deals your Weak Point damage, you can attempt to poison that creature. The creature must make a Constitution saving throw against a DC equal to 8 plus your proficiency bonus plus your Strength modifier. On a failed save, the creature is considered Poisoned for the next minute. They repeat the saving throw at the end of their turn.
You can use this feature four times. You regain one use at the end of a Short Rest and all expended uses at the end of a Long Rest

sheet.description: When you hit a creature with an attack that deals your Weak Point damage, you can attempt to poison that creature. The creature must make a {{wrathfulstrike:dc}} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is considered Poisoned for the next minute. They repeat the saving throw at the end of their turn. You regain one use at the end of a Short Rest.

description.p: While your Crusader Ward is active, any critical hits against you deals normal damage and you cannot be blinded, deafened or poisoned.

sheet.description: While your Crusader Ward is active, any critical hits against you deals normal damage and you cannot be blinded, deafened or poisoned.
